arts.ttl: Tchouaméni downplays boos by Real Madrid fans and turns attention to Atletico
arts.sum: The France midfielder has being doing his best to turn the cheers into applause after a tough stretch and has been playing well going into Madrid’s decisive Champions League match against city rival Atletico Madrid on Wednesday. With central defenders Raúl Asencio and Antonio Rüdiger set to start, Tchouaméni is expected to play as a midfielder again on Wednesday, when Atletico is likely to come out attacking at home.

arts.ttl: Man City 'add Real Madrid star to list of summer transfer targets' - as Pep Guardiola prepares for squad overhaul
arts.sum: The restructuring already began in January via the additions of Omar Marmoush, Vitor Reis, Nico Gonzalez and Abdukodir Khusanov.

arts.ttl: 5 Real Madrid stars to return to starting line-up vs Atlético
arts.sum: Five members of the first-team ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid are expected to return to starting duties for the club’s next outing. That’s according to El Chiringuito TV,…

arts.ttl: Jeremie Frimpong ruins Liverpool transfer plans as ex Celtic star plays Real Madrid cat and mouse
arts.sum: The Bayer Leverkusen winger was criticised by his teammates after the Champions League defeat to Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: Arda Guler identifies preferred destination amid possible Real Madrid summer exit
arts.sum: Arda Guler has had a very underwhelming time at Real Madrid, and this summer he could be set to leave the club on loan or on a permanent basis. Despite having been unavailable throughout this season, and with multiple attacking players having had injury and form woes, the Turkish playmaker has not been counted upon […] The post Arda Guler identifies preferred destination amid possible Real Madrid summer exit appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star Aurelien Tchouameni – ‘Of course I hear the whistles, but…’
arts.sum: Real Madrid midfielder Aurelien Tchouameni has looked back to his best in recent games, but it has been a difficult ride to get to that point this season. The Frenchman has spent much of the season playing in central defence as an emergency option, but since returning to his natural position in front of the […] The post Real Madrid star Aurelien Tchouameni – ‘Of course I hear the whistles, but…’ appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Risk Historic Champions League Knockout Stage Failure vs. Atletico Madrid
arts.sum: Real Madrid have never been eliminated by Atlético Madrid in the Champions League knockout stage.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: William Saliba comments on contract talks amid Real Madrid links
arts.sum: Arsenal defender William Saliba breaks his silence on contract talks with the Gunners amid ongoing speculation regarding interest from Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Tchouameni: “Real Madrid will play for the win against Atlético Madrid”
arts.sum: In defense you have more time to play, but the difference is that it’s more complicated to stay focused. “At the start of every game, the important thing is to be focused.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “If you run a lot you can tie the game, if you make the difference you can win it”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti met with journalists for his usual pre-match press conference ahead of the Champions League last 16 second leg, where he addressed a number of topics. Asked on what was required to win, Ancelotti was clear, “if you run a lot you can tie the game, if you make the difference you can win it.”
